name: Hummingboard Edge / Gate GPIO Header
orientationHint: USB/ports toward you — odd pins on the left column, even on the right (wiringX manual layout)
notes: wiringX manual uses a non-standard GPIO Mapping layout — placeholder header.

formFactor.label: 40-pin header
